items.title: RoboCop 3 - UK Theatrical Trailer
items.author: Oliver Harper
items.content:
This trailer was featured on the ex rental copy of No Escape (1994). Oddly this Robo trailer doesn't feature any music from the film not even the main theme but it's nicely edited. RoboCop 3 was distributed by Columbia Tri-Star in the UK.
